languages.text: "Лукха. Я понимаю. Искупление для одного. Идите и спасите пару ребят, а я уж... как-нибудь... сам. Не хочу... быть.... обузой".
"Lukha, I understand. Atonement for the one. Go and save some of the others... I'll just... manage... on my own. I don't want... to be... a burden."
languages.original_text: "Лукха. Я понимаю. Искупление для одного. Идите и спасите пару ребят, а я уж... как-нибудь... сам. Не хочу... быть.... обузой".

traits.locale_text: "Lukha. I understand. Atonement for the one. Go and save a few of the others... I'll just... manage... on my own. I don't want... to be... a burden."
"Lukha, I understand. Atonement for the one. Go and save some of the others... I'll just... manage... on my own. I don't want... to be... a burden."
"I understand. Freedom for the one. Go and save a few of the others... I'll just... manage... on my own."
"Lukha. I understand. Atonement for the one. Go and save a few of the others... I'll just... manage... on my own. I don't want... to be... a burden."
"Lukha, I understand. Atonement for the one. Go and save some of the others... I'll just... manage... on my own. I don't want... to be... a burden."

languages.text: 「わかった。一人に自由を。行って、他の者を何人か救ってこい……私は……一人で……何とかする」
languages.original_text: "I understand. Freedom for the one. Go and save a few of the others... I'll just... manage... on my own."

traits.locale_text: わかった。一人に自由を。行って、他の者を何人か救ってこい……私は……一人で……何とかする。

languages.text: « Je comprends, Lukha. Expiation pour un seul. Allez vous occuper des autres... Je vais... me débrouiller. Je ne voudrais pas... être un fardeau. »
languages.original_text: "Lukha, I understand. Atonement for the one. Go and save some of the others... I'll just... manage... on my own. I don't want... to be... a burden."

traits.locale_text: « Je comprends, Lukha. Expiation pour un seul. Allez vous occuper des autres... Je vais... me débrouiller. Je ne voudrais pas... être un fardeau. »

languages.text: "Lukha, anlıyorum. Sona kalana kefaret. Git ve diğerlerini kurtar... Ben... Kendi başımın çaresine bakarım. Yük olmak istemiyorum."
languages.original_text: "Lukha, I understand. Atonement for the one. Go and save some of the others... I'll just... manage... on my own. I don't want... to be... a burden."

traits.locale_text: "Lukha, anlıyorum. Sona kalana kefaret. Git ve diğerlerini kurtar... Ben... Kendi başımın çaresine bakarım. Yük olmak istemiyorum."

languages.text: "Lukha, ich verstehe. Sühne für den Einzelnen. Geht und rettet einige der anderen ... Ich ... komme ... schon zurecht." "Ich will ... keine ... Last sein."
languages.original_text: "Lukha, I understand. Atonement for the one. Go and save some of the others... I'll just... manage... on my own. I don't want... to be... a burden."

traits.locale_text: "Lukha, ich verstehe. Sühne für den Einzelnen. Geht und rettet einige der anderen ... Ich ... komme ... schon zurecht." "Ich will ... keine ... Last sein."

languages.text: «Lukha, lo entiendo. Expiación para el último. Vaya y salve a los otros. Yo... me las apañaré... por mi cuenta. No quiero... ser... una carga».
languages.original_text: "Lukha, I understand. Atonement for the one. Go and save some of the others... I'll just... manage... on my own. I don't want... to be... a burden."

traits.locale_text: «Lukha, lo entiendo. Expiación para el último. Vaya y salve a los otros. Yo... me las apañaré... por mi cuenta. No quiero... ser... una carga».

languages.text: “卢卡，我明白。一人之赎。去救其他人……我还……撑得住。我不想……成为……累赘。”
languages.original_text: "Lukha, I understand. Atonement for the one. Go and save some of the others... I'll just... manage... on my own. I don't want... to be... a burden."

traits.locale_text: “卢卡，我明白。一人之赎。去救其他人……我还……撑得住。我不想……成为……累赘。”
